---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-block">
  <h1 class="hero-title">Welcome to LISSY</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">A secure remote-execution system for accessing LIS and LWS microdata from anywhere, in <strong>Stata</strong>, <strong>R</strong>, <strong>SAS</strong>, or <strong>SPSS</strong>.</p>
  <a href="https://webui.lisdatacenter.org/userinterface/" class="hero-btn">Login to LISSY →</a>
</div>
```

![](/images/intro_console.png){fig-align="center" style="border-radius: 8px; margin: 2rem 0; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);"}

```{=html}
<div class="paths-row">

  <div class="path-card path-card--new">
    <div class="path-card__eyebrow">New to LISSY?</div>
    <h3 class="path-card__title">Get started</h3>
    <p class="path-card__desc">Everything you need to set up your account and run your first job.</p>
    <ul class="path-card__links">
      <li><a href="/getting-started/registration.html">→ Register for LISSY</a></li>
      <li><a href="/getting-started/submit_first_job.html">→ Submit your first job</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="path-card path-card--exp">
    <div class="path-card__eyebrow">Already familiar?</div>
    <h3 class="path-card__title">Dive deeper</h3>
    <p class="path-card__desc">Workflows, best practices, and templates for R and Stata users.</p>
    <ul class="path-card__links">
      <li><a href="/r-users/index.html">→ R Users</a></li>
      <li><a href="/stata-users/index.html">→ Stata Users</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>
```

For any questions, contact our [User Support](/faqs/index.qmd#contact-support) service.

---

**News and Upcoming Events**

- Most recent activity at [LIS](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/news-and-events/)
- Latest [Data News](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/news-and-events/highlights/)
- Our quarterly [newsletter](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/newsletter/)

```{=html}
<style>
/* Hero */
.hero-block {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 3rem 1rem 2rem;
}
.hero-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #325d88;
  border: 1px solid #c7d3e0;
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 4px 14px;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.hero-title {
  font-size: 2.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2e42;
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
}
.hero-sub {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin: 0 auto 1.75rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.hero-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 12px 30px;
  background-color: #325d88;
  color: white !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border-radius: 25px;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
}
.hero-btn:hover {
  background-color: #254870;
}

/* Side-by-side cards */
.paths-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin: 2.5rem 0;
}
.path-card {
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.75rem;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.path-card--new {
  background-color: #f0f5fb;
  border-color: #c7d3e0;
}
.path-card--exp {
  background-color: #fdf6f3;
  border-color: #e8c9bc;
}
.path-card__eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #325d88;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.path-card--exp .path-card__eyebrow {
  color: #D5490C;
}
.path-card__title {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2e42;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}
.path-card__desc {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
}
.path-card__links {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
}
.path-card__links li {
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.path-card__links a {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #325d88;
}
.path-card--exp .path-card__links a {
  color: #D5490C;
}
.path-card__links a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .paths-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .hero-title {
    font-size: 1.9rem;
  }
}
</style>
```
